verses.text: “Ka nuntakna ka cimtak mahmah ta hi. Ka dahna thu ka ut utin ka gen ding a, ka lungkham manin ka paupau ding hi
Pasian kiangah hih bangin ka ci ding hi: Kei hong mawhsak kei in. Kei nong langpan'na thu hong gen in
Na khut tawh na sepsate simmawh bawlin, migilote' vai pan'pihin, hih bangin nong netniamna-ah bang phattuamna ngah na hi hiam
Mihing bang lelin gamta na hi hiam
Na nuntak hun tan kote' nuntak tan bang lelin ngaihsun na hi hiam
Bang hangin ka mawhna hong sulzuihin, ka khialhna khempeuh hong kantel na hi hiam
Ka mawhlohna na thei a, nang kiang panin kei hong hon ding a omlohna na theihsa mah ahi hi
“Nangma khut tawh kei hong lomin na hong piangsak a, tu-in nangma khut mah in kei hong lehsuksiat hi
Leivui pana kei nong bawlna hong phawkkik in. Leivui mahin hong dengvui kik takpi ding na hi hiam
Kei ka pian'na dingin ka pa' tungah tha na guan' a, ka nu' sungah kei nong khangsak hi
Guh leh thaguite tawh ka pumpi ding nong bawl a, sazang leh vun tawh tua guhte nong tuamsak hi
Kei, nuntakna hong pia-in, nong it tawntung a, nangma hong kepna hangin kei ka nungta hi
Ahi zongin a beisa hun sung khempeuhah kei-a' ding thusim khat na neihna tu-in ka theita hi
Ka khialhkhaknate hong ensim niloh na hih manin ka mawhnate hong maisak nuamlo na hi hi
Ka khialh phetin gim nong pia pah a, ka gamtat hoih ciangin zong nong pakta tuan kei hi. Mindaina leh maizumna tawh kei ka kidim hi
Mavan'na khatpeuh neisun leng zong, humpinelkai bangin ka siatna ding na zong a, kei' gimtheihna dingin na lamdang tuamtuam nangawn na bawl liang hi
Kei a hong langpang dingin teci na nei tawntung a, keima tungah na hehna hong khang semsem a, kei nong sukna ding thuthak na mu tawntung hi
“Pasian aw, bang hangin ka nu' sung panin kei hong piangsak peuhmah na hi hiam? Kuama hong muh ma-in a si hizaw hoh leng
Ka nu' sung pan hankhuk zuat pah ding pen mihinga pian'loh zah mahin a hoih ahi hi
Keima nuntakna bei dektak ta hilo ahi hiam? Hong hici omsak hoh in! Ka hun neih laisun teng nuam takin hong zangsak in
Kei a pai baihta ding ka hi a, a hong ciahkik ngei ding ka hi kei hi — khuamial, lungzin'na gam
khuavak nangawn khuamial ahihna gam, khuamial gam, lungzin'na gam, lungkhamna gam, a zuan ta ding ka hi hi,” a ci hi.
